title: Secure File Encryption App
problem: Need secure file sharing without relying on third-party services
approach: Developed web app using Node.js backend with AES-256 encryption, implemented client-side key derivation
outcome: Enabled secure file exchange for team, processed 500+ files with zero data breaches

title: Password Strength Analyzer
problem: Weak passwords remain top cause of account compromises
approach: Created CLI tool using regex patterns and entropy calculations to evaluate passwords against common attacks
outcome: Analyzed 1000+ passwords, improved organizational password policy reducing breaches by 40%
